message:
✨ Add product images, prices & tank mate recommendations to calculator (#26)

Fetch products server-side (Shopify + Amazon) and pass to the calculator
component. Species picker buttons now show fish thumbnails and price
ranges. Selected fish cards display product images instead of generic
icons, with variety counts. New Tank Mate Recommendations section uses
the wizard's groupFishByType/getTankMateRecommendations utilities to
suggest compatible species with images, badges, and Add buttons.
Stocking Summary now includes estimated fish cost.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
